{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = The crown
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The crown]] is a sacred charge held by [[Captain Tommison]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“Of course!” Tommison blustered. “I would scarcely abandon my sacred charge.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
